docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF NON SERVICE (TRANSACTION ID # 210069126) (TRANSACTION ID # 210069126) FILED BY PLAINTIFF DISCOVER BANK
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR OCT-22-2024 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF(S) OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF OCT-22-2024 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
